mapper.select: SELECT cl.id, cl.task_id AS taskId, cl.task_name AS taskName, cl.start_time AS startTime, cl.end_time AS endTime, cl.status, cl.crawled_count AS crawledCount, cl.error_message AS errorMessage, cl.retry_count AS retryCount, cl.executor_id AS executorId, cl.created_at AS createdAt FROM crawl_task_logs cl WHERE cl.task_id = #{taskId} ORDER BY cl.id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO crawl_task_logs (task_id, task_name, start_time, status, crawled_count, error_message, retry_count, executor_id) VALUES (#{taskId}, #{taskName}, #{startTime}, #{status}, #{crawledCount}, #{errorMessage}, #{retryCount}, #{executorId})
